title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 483.530 - Fees, clerk's duties
text:
483.530.  Fees, clerk's duties. — The clerk who is responsible for collecting fees pursuant to the provisions of section 483.550 shall charge and collect the court costs in such amounts as are determined pursuant to sections 488.010 to 488.020*.
(L. 1978 H.B. 1634, A.L. 1982 S.B. 497, A.L. 1996 S.B. 869) 
Effective 7-01-97 
*Words "section 514.015" appear in original rolls, which was changed to effectuate the court cost bill.
